name: show-me-the-prd-codex
description: Codex-native PRD bundle generation from a rough product idea or partial spec.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a rough idea into a five-file PRD bundle in Codex
interface.longDescription: Package the Codex-native `show-me-the-prd` skill with chat-first interview rules so users can turn rough ideas or partial specs into a structured five-file PRD bundle.
defaultPrompt: Turn this rough app idea into a PRD bundle with scope, data model, phases, and project spec.
Use show-me-the-prd to normalize these planning notes into a five-file handoff.
Help me clarify this product idea with short chat questions and then write the PRD files.
